title: lastrea dura
intro: Lastrea dura, also known as the leathery fern or black fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the genus Lastrea, which is commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The medicinal properties of Lastrea dura lie in its ability to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of using Lastrea dura include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and improving digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Lastrea dura include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying and processing the plant's leaves and stems.
